profilePurpose: Low-sensitivity preference profile for daily AIHOT and robotics research briefing generation.
primaryFocus: papers / arXiv / research with actionable experimental implications
expert and founder opinions only when they affect research direction or capability planning
robotics company capability requirements and skill roadmap

layoutRules.itemShape: full-width row with left metadata rail and right headline, deck, and in-place expansion

sourceDigestRules.minimumLength: Every expanded item must include an Original-source digest of at least 500 Chinese characters.
sourceDigestRules.purpose: The expanded item should let the user understand the original source without opening every link.
mustInclude: detailed Chinese reconstruction of source content
important numbers, settings, platforms, job requirements, methods, datasets, or limitations when available
clear separation between source facts and analyst inference

microcopyRules.purpose: Small text must serve the content, not describe the writing process.

referenceStyle: strategy memo written by a private analyst
editorialVoice.tone: calm, literate, strategic, slightly sharp, evidence-aware, and judgment-led
editorialVoice.preferredStructure: Thesis -> source digest over 500 Chinese characters -> evidence boundary -> strategic read -> research and capability consequence -> action
hardBans: 值得注意的是 repeated mechanically
writeLike: a sharp technology columnist with market sense
a calm strategy analyst who understands research incentives
a paid newsletter writer who compresses evidence into judgment

downrank: pure LLM benchmarks without robotics implication
generationGuidance.format: mobile-first premium editorial briefing ledger; Chinese main text; preserve English technical terms; every expanded item includes a 500+ Chinese character Original-source digest; writing must avoid formulaic contrast patterns and AI-like transitions.
